languages.text: "Не утешай себя бесплодными мечтами — Истине нужны воины, а не рабы!"

traits.locale_text: "Не утешай себя бесплодными мечтами — Истине нужны воины, а не рабы!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

languages.text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"
languages.original_text: "Не утешай себя бесплодными мечтами — Истине нужны воины, а не рабы!"

traits.locale_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

traits.locale_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"

traits.locale_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

traits.locale_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

languages.text: "Tröste dich nicht mit vergeblichen Träumen — was die Wahrheit braucht, sind Krieger, keine Sklaven!"
languages.original_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"

traits.locale_text: "Tröste dich nicht mit vergeblichen Träumen — was die Wahrheit braucht, sind Krieger, keine Sklaven!"

languages.text: "Ne vous réconfortez pas avec des rêves futiles — la Vérité a besoin de guerriers, pas d'esclaves !
languages.original_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"

traits.locale_text: "Ne vous réconfortez pas avec des rêves futiles — la Vérité a besoin de guerriers, pas d'esclaves !

languages.text: "No te consueles con sueños vanos: ¡lo que la Verdad necesita son guerreros, no esclavos!".
languages.original_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"

traits.locale_text: "No te consueles con sueños vanos: ¡lo que la Verdad necesita son guerreros, no esclavos!".

languages.text: "Kendinizi boş hayallerle avutmayın — Gerçeğin ihtiyacı olan şey savaşçılardır, köleler değil!"
languages.original_text: "Do not comfort yourself with futile dreams — what the Truth needs is warriors, not slaves!"

traits.locale_text: "Kendinizi boş hayallerle avutmayın — Gerçeğin ihtiyacı olan şey savaşçılardır, köleler değil!"
